docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS AND LABORERS LOCAL UNION NO. 270 HEARING SET FOR FEB-15-2005 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS AND LABORERS LOCAL UNION NO. 270 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUCAS CONCRETE $10,460.80 PRINCIPAL, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $483.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,943.80, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-15-2005 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS AND LABORERS LOCAL UNION NO. 270 AS TO RESPONDENT LUCAS CONCRETE DOES 1 THRU 20 JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
